game_name: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles III: The Manhattan Project

special_mechanics.name: Toss Attack
special_mechanics.description: Performed by holding D-pad downwards while pressing B. Allows player to throw enemies

special_mechanics.name: Special Attack
special_mechanics.description: Each turtle has a different special attack performed by pressing B and A simultaneously. Costs a portion of energy bar (unless on last life bar)

tier_notes: Tier 2: Empirical/qualitative data only. No quantified physics parameters documented in available sources. Game is a beat-em-up with standard NES-era movement controls (one attack button, one jump button). Limited mechanical documentation available.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - TMNT III: The Manhattan Project
Wikipedia - Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles III: The Manhattan Project
